calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing The Receipt For The Blocked Account
Off Calendar Dec-31-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing The Receipt For The Blocked Account
Off Calendar Dec-03-2024 Continued To Dec-31-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing The Receipt For The Blocked Account
Off Calendar Oct-22-2024 Continued To Dec-03-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Julie Ishii appeared by zoom for Anna Lee (personal representative).

The court questions why the funds have not been deposited into a blocked account. Mrs. Ishii stated that the beneficiary's last name was spelled incorrectly in the orders and that she submitted an ex parte petition last week to correct the spelling of the name. Status on filing of the receipt for the blocked account is continued to December 3, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Colhour. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing The Receipt For The Blocked Account
Off Calendar Oct-01-2024 Continued To Oct-22-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Julie Ishii appeared by zoom for Anna Lee (personal representative).

Mrs. Ishii stated that they have not opened the blocked account, that they have an appoitment with Wells Fargo on Friday, and that they found a new person at Wells Fargo who has a better understanding about the process. Status on filing of the receipt for the blocked account is continued to October 22, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Gutierrez. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing The Receipt For The Blocked Account
Off Calendar Sep-03-2024 Continued To Oct-01-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Julie Ishii appeared by zoom for Anna Lee (personal representative).

Mrs. Ishii stated that Wells Fargo was unable to open an account for them even after three times of going to the bank and that they will be going to Chase Bank next week to open the account. Status on filing of the receipt for the blocked account is continued to October 1, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Lopez. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-24-2024 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-25-2024 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-12-2024 Continued To Jul-24-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Julie Ishii appeared by zoom for Anna Lee (personal representative).

Mrs. Ishii requested that the funds for the beneficiary who is turning 16 tomorrow be deposited into a CUTMA account with the mother as the custodian rather than a blocked account to avoid expense and stated that it will be easier for the minor to retrieve the funds when he turns 18. The court noted that it is a local rule. Aron's distribution is to be deposited into a blocked account. The Amended First and Final Account and Report of Personal Representative, etc., is continued to July 24, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The probate examiner will set a status hearing date for filing of the receipt for the blocked account when she receives the order.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Nov-29-2023 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Oct-24-2023 Continued To Nov-29-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jun-14-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Julie Ishii appearing via zoom for Patricia Anne Martin (Petitioner).

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters of administration with will annexed. The will dated December 08, 2022 is admitted to probate. Patricia Anne Martin is appointed as the administrator of the estate with will annexed and with full authority. Bond is set at $450,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 25, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Karen Ann Simmons is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.
